description: Identifies idle or potentially unused load balancers while requiring traffic, DNS, listener, target, and owner validation before deletion.

cost.pricing_source: Static fallback estimate. Prefer AWS Pricing MCP, AWS Pricing API, or cost_report region-specific pricing when available.
cost.note: ALB cost includes load balancer hours plus LCU usage. Truly idle ALBs may still incur fixed hourly cost while LCU cost is zero or near zero.

severity_rules.name: idle_load_balancer_review_delete
severity_rules.condition: request_count_sum == 0 AND active_connection_count_max == 0 AND new_connection_count_sum == 0 AND processed_bytes_sum == 0 AND zero_days >= min_zero_days AND dependency_checks_clear == true
severity_rules.description: Load balancer appears idle for the full observation window and dependency checks are clear. Delete only after owner approval and controlled traffic drain.

severity_rules.name: zero_requests_with_dependency_signal
severity_rules.condition: request_count_sum == 0 AND (active_connection_count_max > 0 OR healthy_host_count_max > 0 OR dns_dependency_present == true OR listener_dependency_present == true)
severity_rules.description: No request traffic is visible, but dependency signals exist. Investigate health checks, private traffic, migration state, DNS, and listeners before cleanup.

severity_rules.name: low_traffic_variable_cost_optimization
severity_rules.description: Load balancer has low but nonzero traffic. Consider consolidation, listener sharing, or architecture cleanup instead of deletion.

severity_rules.name: missing_governance_tags
severity_rules.condition: missing Owner OR Environment OR Purpose tags
severity_rules.description: Missing ownership tags make safe cleanup difficult.

severity_rules.name: deletion_blocker_present
severity_rules.condition: deletion_protection_enabled == true OR dr_role_present == true OR blue_green_role_present == true
severity_rules.description: A deletion blocker or special role is present. Do not remove without owner and architecture approval.

validation_before_delete: Check Route 53, CNAME, CloudFront origin, API Gateway VPC Link, PrivateLink, service discovery, and external DNS.
Check listeners, listener rules, certificates, WAF associations, target groups, healthy hosts, access logs, and security groups.
Check blue/green, canary, migration, disaster recovery, internal/private, and maintenance roles.
Require owner approval and a controlled drain period.
reporting: Separate fixed load balancer-hour savings from LCU/NLCU/GLCU savings.
Use type-appropriate metrics for ALB, NLB, GWLB, and CLB.
